CVE-2022-26125.description: Buffer overflow vulnerabilities exist in FRRouting through 8.1.0 due to wrong checks on the input packet length in isisd/isis_tlvs.c.

CVE-2024-31948.title: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, an attacker using a malformed Pre ...
CVE-2024-31948.description: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, an attacker using a malformed Prefix SID attribute in a BGP UPDATE packet can cause the bgpd daemon to crash.

CVE-2024-31949.title: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, an infinite loop can occur when r ...
CVE-2024-31949.description: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, an infinite loop can occur when receiving a MP/GR capability as a dynamic capability because malformed data results in a pointer not advancing.

CVE-2024-31950.title: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, there can be a buffer overflow an ...
CVE-2024-31950.description: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, there can be a buffer overflow and daemon crash in ospf_te_parse_ri for OSPF LSA packets during an attempt to read Segment Routing subTLVs (their size is not validated).

CVE-2024-31951.title: In the Opaque LSA Extended Link parser in FRRouting (FRR) through ...
CVE-2024-31951.description: In the Opaque LSA Extended Link parser in FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, there can be a buffer overflow and daemon crash in ospf_te_parse_ext_link for OSPF LSA packets during an attempt to read Segment Routing Adjacency SID subTLVs (lengths are not validated).

CVE-2024-44070.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting (FRR) through 10.1. bgp_attr ...
CVE-2024-44070.description: An issue was discovered in FRRouting (FRR) through 10.1. bgp_attr_encap in bgpd/bgp_attr.c does not check the actual remaining stream length before taking the TLV value.

CVE-2025-61099.title: FRRouting/frr from v2.0 through v10.4.1 was discovered to contain ...
CVE-2025-61099.description: FRRouting/frr from v2.0 through v10.4.1 was discovered to contain a NULL pointer dereference via the opaque_info_detail function at ospf_opaque.c. This vulnerability allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted LS Update packet.

CVE-2022-36440.title: A reachable assertion was found in Frrouting frr-bgpd 8.3.0 in th ...
CVE-2022-36440.description: A reachable assertion was found in Frrouting frr-bgpd 8.3.0 in the peek_for_as4_capability function. Attackers can maliciously construct BGP open packets and send them to BGP peers running frr-bgpd, resulting in DoS.

CVE-2022-40302.title: An issue was discovered in bgpd in FRRouting (FRR) through 8.4. B ...
CVE-2022-40302.description: An issue was discovered in bgpd in FRRouting (FRR) through 8.4. By crafting a BGP OPEN message with an option of type 0xff (Extended Length from RFC 9072), attackers may cause a denial of service (assertion failure and daemon restart, or out-of-bounds read). This is possible because of inconsistent boundary checks that do not account for reading 3 bytes (instead of 2) in this 0xff case.

CVE-2022-40318.title: An issue was discovered in bgpd in FRRouting (FRR) through 8.4. B ...
CVE-2022-40318.description: An issue was discovered in bgpd in FRRouting (FRR) through 8.4. By crafting a BGP OPEN message with an option of type 0xff (Extended Length from RFC 9072), attackers may cause a denial of service (assertion failure and daemon restart, or out-of-bounds read). This is possible because of inconsistent boundary checks that do not account for reading 3 bytes (instead of 2) in this 0xff case. NOTE: this behavior occurs in bgp_open_option_parse in the bgp_open.c file, a different location (with a different attack vector) relative to CVE-2022-40302.

CVE-2022-43681.title: An out-of-bounds read exists in the BGP daemon of FRRouting FRR t ...
CVE-2022-43681.description: An out-of-bounds read exists in the BGP daemon of FRRouting FRR through 8.4. When sending a malformed BGP OPEN message that ends with the option length octet (or the option length word, in case of an extended OPEN message), the FRR code reads of out of the bounds of the packet, throwing a SIGABRT signal and exiting. This results in a bgpd daemon restart, causing a Denial-of-Service condition.

CVE-2023-31489.title: An issue found in Frrouting bgpd v.8.4.2 allows a remote attacker ...

CVE-2023-31490.description: An issue found in Frrouting bgpd v.8.4.2 allows a remote attacker to cause a denial of service via the bgp_attr_psid_sub() function.

CVE-2023-38406.description: bgpd/bgp_flowspec.c in FRRouting (FRR) before 8.4.3 mishandles an nlri length of zero, aka a "flowspec overflow."

CVE-2023-38407.title: bgpd/bgp_label.c in FRRouting (FRR) before 8.5 attempts to read b ...
CVE-2023-38407.description: bgpd/bgp_label.c in FRRouting (FRR) before 8.5 attempts to read beyond the end of the stream during labeled unicast parsing.

CVE-2023-41358.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0. bgpd/bgp_pa ...
CVE-2023-41358.description: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0. bgpd/bgp_packet.c processes NLRIs if the attribute length is zero.

CVE-2023-41359.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0. There is an ...
CVE-2023-41359.description: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0. There is an out-of-bounds read in bgp_attr_aigp_valid in bgpd/bgp_attr.c because there is no check for the availability of two bytes during AIGP validation.

CVE-2023-41360.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0. bgpd/bgp_pa ...
CVE-2023-41360.description: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0. bgpd/bgp_packet.c can read the initial byte of the ORF header in an ahead-of-stream situation.

CVE-2023-41909.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0. bgp_nlri_pa ...
CVE-2023-41909.description: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0. bgp_nlri_parse_flowspec in bgpd/bgp_flowspec.c processes malformed requests with no attributes, leading to a NULL pointer dereference.

CVE-2023-46752.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. It mishan ...
CVE-2023-46752.description: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. It mishandles malformed MP_REACH_NLRI data, leading to a crash.

CVE-2023-46753.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash c ...
CVE-2023-46753.description: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash can occur for a crafted BGP UPDATE message without mandatory attributes, e.g., one with only an unknown transit attribute.

CVE-2023-47234.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash c ...
CVE-2023-47234.description: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash can occur when processing a crafted BGP UPDATE message with a MP_UNREACH_NLRI attribute and additional NLRI data (that lacks mandatory path attributes).

CVE-2023-47235.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash c ...
CVE-2023-47235.description: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash can occur when a malformed BGP UPDATE message with an EOR is processed, because the presence of EOR does not lead to a treat-as-withdraw outcome.

CVE-2024-27913.description: ospf_te_parse_te in ospfd/ospf_te.c in FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (ospfd daemon crash) via a malformed OSPF LSA packet, because of an attempted access to a missing attribute field.

CVE-2024-34088.description: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, it is possible for the get_edge() function in ospf_te.c in the OSPF daemon to return a NULL pointer. In cases where calling functions do not handle the returned NULL value, the OSPF daemon crashes, leading to denial of service.
